summary: Comprehensive testing of Latency Pulse features and Encounter endpoints. All 21 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified for RPG Bosses tab (Cosmic Threats, World Veins, NPC Rival), Shop Transmute, Rock Hounding, Inventory, Cosmic Store, SmartDock, Evolution Lab, and Refinement Lab.

issues: World Veins section not visible in initial view - may need scroll or no active veins spawned

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Latency Pulse features working: LatencyProvider wraps app, LatencyHUD renders in top-right (z-40), auto-clears after 4s. Encounter endpoints all functional: /encounters/daily-boss, /encounters/world-veins, /encounters/rival, /encounters/rival-action. Boss battle working with Meditate/Frequency/Breathe attacks dealing damage. Shop Transmute has Alchemical Exchange panel with preset dust amounts (150/300/450/750). Inventory shows specimens with RAW/POLISHED state badges. All pages load correctly: Rock Hounding (EnergyBar, DepthLayer, CoreStatsHUD), Cosmic Store, SmartDock, Evolution Lab, Refinement Lab.

features_verified.latency_hud: LatencyProvider and LatencyHUD implemented in useLatencyPulse.js, wrapped in App.js

rpg_bosses_tab.cosmic_threats: Shadow of Doubt boss with HP bar (4871/5000), Join Battle button, attack phases (Meditate/Frequency/Breathe)
rpg_bosses_tab.world_veins: API endpoint returns world_veins array (may be empty if none spawned)
rpg_bosses_tab.npc_rival: Rival section visible with Compete/Evade buttons, API returns rival data with strategy/speed/steal_chance

features_verified.boss_battle: Attacks deal damage (16 damage from Meditate), HP bar decrements correctly
features_verified.shop_transmute: Alchemical Exchange panel with 150 Dust = 1 Credit rate, preset buttons (150/300/450/750)
features_verified.rpg_inventory: Shows 19/55 items with RAW/POLISHED state badges on specimens
features_verified.rock_hounding: Mine/Collection/Catalog tabs, EnergyBar (17/20), DepthLayers (1-5), CoreStatsHUD, Universe Layer bar
features_verified.cosmic_store: Consumables/Cosmetics/Credits/Nexus Pass tabs, items with rarity badges and prices
features_verified.smartdock: Slot a Stone button, Evolve/Refine/Store quick links
features_verified.evolution_lab: The Eruption season, stage overview, Alchemical Exchange, specimen filters, Polish buttons
features_verified.refinement_lab: Digital Tumbler, Starseed Components, Your Collection with specimens
